title: maytenus tenuispina
intro: Maytenus tenuispina is a species of flowering plant in the family Celastraceae, commonly known as the 'Mayten tree' or 'Chilean mayten'. This plant has been traditionally used in medicine for its various medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiviral effects. The health benefits of Maytenus tenuispina include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support immune function. The herbal preparations of this plant include teas, infusions, and extracts, which are often used to make medicinal products and supplements.
